M-RELEASE.NAME: Erlang Release Build
M-RELEASE.Purpose: Build a single deployable Erlang release and container image containing both proxy and portal capabilities.

Scope.Item: Compose upstream codebases into one runtime artifact
Define the Dockerfile and build-time dependencies
Compile and boot user-facing Erlang sources with explicit UTF-8-safe handling for Cyrillic literals
Inject `mtproto_proxy` per-SNI secret settings from env at runtime
Expose release configuration surfaces used in production

Interfaces.Interface: Produces the runtime image for Compose deployment.

Risks.Risk: Combining upstream repositories may introduce release-time dependency conflicts
Encoding drift between source files and build flags can corrupt user-facing copy at runtime
